results.title: SDG&E, Qualcomm and UC San Diego Launch Edge AI Collaboration to Advance Wildfire and Extreme-Weather Response - Jun 8, 2026
highlights:
SAN DIEGO, June 8, 2026 / PRNewswire/ -- San Diego Gas & Electric(SDG&E), a subsidiary of Sempra (NYSE:SRE), Qualcomm Technologies, Inc. and the University of California San Diego's Scripps Institution of Oceanography today announced Edge Alert Sentinel (EAS), a new collaboration that will bring artificial intelligence (AI) directly to the front lines of wildfire and extreme-weather response. Designed to detect and analyze rapidly changing conditions in real time, the initiative represents a new approach to environmental intelligence — processing critical data at the point of risk to help utilities and emergency responders act faster when it matters most.
...
working to apply AI directly integrated on field devices and real-time connectivity to support automated inspections of
...
approach to physical
...
At the core of the deployment is a ruggedized edge AI gateway platform powered by the Qualcomm Dragonwing™ IQ9 processor, a high-performance, multi-core application processor that features a neural-processing unit capable of delivering up to 100 trillion operations per second. Using an MLOps platform from Edge Impulse, a Qualcomm company, on-device models help forecast conditions that could impact grid infrastructure in residential areas, to support more proactive decision-making for utility operators. Monitoring data and predictive alerts can be transmitted directly to SDG&E's control center via its private cellular network.
...
- Qualcomm Technologies will provide advanced on-device AI processing capabilities and low-latency, edge-computing architecture to support SDG&E's environmental intelligence, autonomous inspection and grid-resilience efforts at the edge.
- SDG&E will contribute operational expertise, grid infrastructure and weather-data networks.
- Scripps Institution of Oceanography will provide long-standing observational data and scientific expertise to enhance modeling and real-time analysis.
...
Together, the collaborators are building a continuous loop of live data, on-
...
analysis and actionable insights designed to translate rapidly changing conditions into timely action that enhance safety, reliability and grid resilience.
...
&ESan Diego Gas & Electric® (SDG&E)
...
an innovative energy-delivery company that provides clean, safe and reliable energy to better the lives of
...
people it serves in San Diego and southern Orange counties. The company is committed to creating a sustainable future by increasing energy delivered from low- or zero-carbon sources; accelerating the adoption of electric vehicles and investing in innovative technologies to ensure the reliable operation of the region's infrastructure for generations to come. SDG&E is a recognized leader in its industry and community, as demonstrated by being named Corporate Partner of the Year at the San Diego Business Journal's Nonprofit & Corporate Citizenship Awards and receiving PA Consulting's ReliabilityOne® Award for Outstanding Reliability Performance for 20 consecutive years. SDG&E is a subsidiary of Sempra (NYSE: SRE), a leading U.S. utility growth business. For more information, visit SDGEtoday.com or connect with SDG&E on social media @SDGE. Message funded by SDG&E shareholders.
...
About QualcommQual
...
relentlessly innovates to deliver intelligent computing everywhere, helping the world tackle some of its most important challenges. Building on our 40 years of technology leadership in creating era-defining breakthroughs, we deliver a broad portfolio of solutions built with our leading-edge AI, high-performance, low-power computing, and unrivaled connectivity. Our Snapdragon® platforms power extraordinary consumer experiences, and our Qualcomm Dragonwing™ products empower businesses and industries to scale to new heights. Together with our ecosystem partners, we enable next-generation digital transformation to enrich lives, improve businesses, and advance societies. At Qualcomm, we are engineering human progress

results.title: Sean X. L.
highlights:
Data Strategy & Governance Leader at [Sempra](https://www.linkedin.com/company/sempra-energy)
...
I lead enterprise data transformations where complexity, scale, regulation, and business intersect. My work spans building data platforms, governance models, and AI-ready ecosystems across regulated industries — translating technical complexity into executive decisions that move businesses forward in highly regulated environments My focus is simple: turn data into trusted decisions at scale -across highly regulated environments. I’ve built and led data strategy, governance, and platform transformations supporting: ● $600B+ global payments ecosystems ● Digital banking platforms serving 5M+ customers ● $60B+ energy and healthcare infrastructure Where most organizations struggle isn’t the technology— it’s aligning data, ownership, and risk to how decisions are actually made. That’s where I operate. Scope includes: ● Enterprise data strategy and federated operating models (data mesh) ●Data governance, lineage, quality, and MDM at scale ●AI/ML lifecycle governance and regulatory alignment ●Cloud data platforms (Databricks, Azure, GCP, Terraform) ●Enterprise architecture, controls, and platform integration Business impact: ● Reduced enterprise data risk exposure by ~70% ● Delivered $5M+ in operational savings through platform modernization ● Improved reporting and decision velocity by up to 40% ● Accelerated product delivery timelines by ~20% ● Enabled governed data products powering analytics and AI at scale I partner with CIOs, CDOs, and executive teams to align data, technology, and risk— so AI, analytics, and operations drive measurable business outcomes.

results.title: Senior AI/ML Engineer at Jobgether - United State | Visa Sponsorship Jobs
highlights:
# Senior AI/ML Engineer
...
We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.
...
AI and ML
...
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems
...
Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development
...
Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen
...
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems.
...
- Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development.
...

...

and monitoring AI

...

...

...
- 7+ years of experience building, deploying, and maintaining machine learning systems in production environments.
...
- Strong proficiency in Python, including experience building reusable packages and scalable data pipelines.
...
- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP, including CI/CD and containerized deployments.
...
- Solid understanding of ML system design, MLOps principles, and end-to-end model lifecycle management.
...
- Experience with distributed computing frameworks and relational/non-relational databases.
...
- Familiarity with Databricks and large-scale data processing environments.
...

Southern California Edison (SCE)
...
# Senior Data Analytics Manager
...
Become a Senior Data Analytics Manager at Southern California Edison (SCE) and build a better tomorrow. In this job, you’ll be leading a talented and dynamic team that provides centralized data, analytics, and reporting on SCE’s assets and operations to support operational decisions, enable regulatory compliance, and inform data-driven strategies.
...
As a Senior Data Analytics Manager, your work will help power our planet, reduce carbon emissions and create cleaner air for everyone. Are you ready to take on the challenge to help us build the future?
...
- Advises business leaders by providing data-based strategic direction to identify and address business issues and opportunities.
...
- Identifies areas to increase efficiency and automate data analysis processes.
...
- Plans, manages, and controls the activities of a team or teams of analysts that provide business intelligence and strategic planning support for business segments or the company at large.
...
- Leads initiatives to analyze complex business problems and issues using data from internal and external sources.
...
- Brings expertise or identifies subject matter experts in support of multi-functional efforts to identify, interpret, and produce recommendations and plans based on company and external data analysis.
...
- Oversees the activities of defining data requirements, data collection, processing, cleaning, analysis, modeling, and visualization.
...
- Examines and identifies data patterns and trends to help answer business questions and improve decision-making.
...
- Provides input for complex data science and big data mining projects.
...
- Five or more years of experience managing or supervising an organization or unit, or five or more years of project-management experience.
- Experience with data analysis and data systems and software.
...
- Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, statistics, mathematics, data analytics, or a closely related science and engineering field.
...
- Five or more years of hands-on experience working in data analytics roles, including experience with ETL processes and navigating ambiguity within available data sources.
...
- Hands-on experiences with languages like Python, SQL, or SAS and SAP as well familiarity with cloud computing environments (e.g., AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) and data visualization tools like SAP Datasphere or Power BI.
...
- Experience designing and maintaining processes to manage high volumes of analytical requests, ensuring timely delivery and consistently high-quality outputs.
...
- Experience overseeing responses to regulatory data requests from external agencies (e.g., Energy Safety, SED) and compliance reporting, including assigning work, reviewing the accuracy of the outputs, meeting tight deadlines and ensuring consistency with prior submissions.
...
- Experience driving process improvements, automation, and standardization of analytics workflows to improve efficiency, reduce manual effort, and enhance data quality
...
- Experience providing technical direction and subject matter expertise on asset data, asset inspections, notifications, work orders and compliance requirements.
...
The people at SCE don’t just keep the lights on. Our mission is so much bigger. We’re fueling the kind of innovation that’s changing an entire industry, and quite possibly the planet. Join us and create a future with cleaner energy, while providing our customers with the safety and reliability they demand. At SCE, you’ll have a chance to grow personally and professionally, making a real impact in Southern California and around the world.

# Director of Data Analytics & Artificial Intelligence (AI) Solutions
...
Job Description SummaryWe are seeking a dynamic, forward-thinking and results-driven Director of Data Analytics and Artificial Intelligence to lead our artificial intelligence and machine learning strategy, execution, and team development. Reporting to the CTO, this role will define the direction of AI/ML initiatives, ensuring the development of scalable, high-performance AI solutions that drive innovation and create business value. The ideal candidate will have a strong technical background, experience leading AI/ML teams, and the ability to align AI strategies with business objectives. If you are passionate about leveraging AI to transform industries and motivated by the challenge of pushing technological boundaries, we invite you to apply and be part of our journey to redefine what's possible in energy.
...
- Develop and execute Grid Automation’s AI/ML strategy, aligning it with business goals to drive differentiation, efficiency, and growth
...
- Build, mentor, and lead a diverse team of data scientists, machine learning engineers, and AI specialists, fostering a collaborative environment that promotes innovation and knowledge sharing
...
- Act as the thought leader for AI/ML technology, staying up-to-date with industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices
...
- Drive innovation in AI methodologies, including deep learning, reinforcement learning, natural language processing (NLP), and computer vision
...
- Oversee the design of robust machine learning pipelines and data workflows, ensuring seamless data ingestion, processing, and model deployment
...
- Ensure that AI/ML solutions are scalable, efficient, and integrate seamlessly with existing systems and data infrastructure
...
- Define and track key performance indicators (KPIs) for AI/ML models ensuring that solutions deliver business value and meet performance expectations
...
- Monitor, maintain, and optimize deployed AI/ML models, ensuring continuous improvements in model accuracy and performance
...
- Stay informed of regulatory requirements around data privacy, security, and ethics, ensuring that AI/ML solutions comply with all relevant standards and laws
...
- Collaborate with product managers, engineering teams, and other functions to identify opportunities and define project scope, timelines, and deliverables for AI/ML projects
...
- Foster an environment of continuous learning, encouraging the team to experiment with new algorithms, frameworks, and methodologies
...
- Qualifications:
...
- Master’s/PhD Degree in computer science, electrical engineering, or electric power engineering
- 10+ years of experience in AI/ML, including unsupervised learning, supervised learning, and reinforcement learning, large language models (LLMs)
- Proven experience in developing, deploying, and scaling machine learning and AI models in production environments
...
- Strong expertise in algorithms, machine learning frameworks (e.g. TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn), and data processing tools
- Extensive knowledge of machine learning algorithms, deep learning, reinforcement learning, NLP, and computer vision
...
- Knowledge of ethical AI principles and data privacy regulations
...
- Advanced experience in utilizing and applying common programming languages, such as Python, C/C++, Java, Spark and Hadoop, R Programming, Kafka, C#, MATLAB, along with good familiarity with power system modeling and data communication format.
...
- Experience with microservices architecture, containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes), and cloud computing platforms (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud)
...
- Expertise in GraphDB, SQL/NoSQL, MS Access, databases
...
- Knowledge of industrial automation or power system design
...
- Published research or contributions to open-source AI/ML projects

results.title: Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization | CareerSync
highlights:
Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization | CareerSync
...
# Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization
...
Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence are at the heart of the Airbnb product. From Trust to Payments, and from Customer Service to Marketing we rely on ML to ensure that guests and hosts have the best possible experience with Airbnb.
...
The CS AI product team is responsible for driving CSxAI (Customer Support x Artificial Intelligence) initiatives by adopting the Generative AI technologies to enable an intelligent, scalable and exceptional service experience. The team develops and enhances various AI models, ML services and tools including LLM fine-tuning, alignment and optimization, RAG/Search, LLM evaluation and testing automation, feedback-based learning and guardrail for a wide range of applications in Airbnb.
...
As a principal machine learning engineer, you will be responsible for fine-tuning state-of-the-art LLMs for diverse use cases while optimizing models for high-performance deployment on Airbnb’s ML Infrastructure. You will partner with product managers, software engineers, data scientists and operation teams to brainstorm, design and develop AI products such as AI Assistant, Autonomous agent, recommendation, travel planning, and many more products that make meaningful impacts in the world of travel.
...
- Work with large scale structured and unstructured data; explore, experiment, build and continuously improve foundation models for Airbnb product, business and operational use cases.
...
- Create a multi-year tech roadmap that enables our team to stay on the leading edge of the rapidly evolving AI landscape and leverage the best in class technologies to deliver customer benefits.
...
- Continuously evaluate recent and upcoming large foundational models, ensuring the selection and refinement of the highest quality models for enhanced performance and efficiency.
...
- Hands-on prototype, develop and productionize LLM models and pipelines at scale, including both batch and real-time use cases.
...
- Drive key AI architectural decisions for products, and contribute to Airbnb’s ML platform architecture and strategy.
...
- Minimum Qualifications:
...
- PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Mathematics, Statistics, or related technical field.
- 10+ years of experience with developing machine learning models and products at scale from inception to business impact.
...
- Programming experience in Python and hands-on experience with frameworks such as PyTorch.
...
- Proven record of training, fine tuning, optimizing models and inference run-time
...
- Post-training experience in areas like data processing for fine-tuning; responsible LLMs; LLM alignment; reinforcement learning; efficient training and inference; language model evaluation; and/or multilingual and multimodal modeling.
...
- Or specialized experience in runtime optimizations, model quantization, compression, on-device inference, GPU inference, pytorch, kernel development
...
- Preferred Qualifications:
...
- PhD in AI, machine learning, data science, or related technical fields.

- Publications at peer-reviewed AI conferences (e.g., NeurIPS, CVPR, ICML, ICLR, ICCV, and ACL).
...
- Customer Support Systems: Experience with AI technologies in customer support applications.
...
- Agile Practice for AI production: Experience with the entire AI product development lifecycle from incubation to production at scale, following agile practices in the Applied AI/ML domain.
...
- Infrastructure Acumen: Experience deploying and scaling business-critical AI services and driving architectural requirements on ML infrastructures

highlights:
Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
...
# Data Scientist
...
Optum is seeking a Data Science professional who is passionate about applying machine learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve complex healthcare problems on a scale. Imagine working with massive volumes of healthcare data spanning clinical, claims, behavioral, and digital interactions – powering intelligent personalization, discovery, and decision support for millions of members, providers, and care teams.
...
At Optum, the Data Science mission is to transform healthcare data into robust, scalable AI solutions, including LLM based and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems that combine enterprise knowledge with advanced language models to deliver accurate, contextual, and trustworthy insights. These solutions help uncover deep usage patterns, member journeys, and care signals that inform and continuously evolve Optum’s digital products, clinical platforms, and healthcare services.
...
Your work will directly influence how healthcare consumers engage with digital experiences, how clinicians access timely insights, and how business and care strategies are shaped through data. By joining Optum’s data science team, you will be part of an exciting journey to build advanced ML and GenAI driven products, grounded in responsible AI principles, that operate at enterprise scale and create meaningful impact across the healthcare ecosystem.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy advanced analytics, machine learning, and Generative AI solutions to address complex healthcare and business problems using largescale structured and unstructured data
...
- Applies advanced techniques including statistics, machine learning, simulation, and mathematical modelling
...
- Build and optimize LLM based applications, including Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks, to enable accurate, context aware, and explainable insights from enterprise healthcare data sources such as clinical notes, claims, provider data, and policy documents
...
- Develop, evaluate, and finetune machine learning and GenAI models, including prompt engineering, retrieval strategies, and model evaluation techniques to improve accuracy, relevance, and performance
...
- Translate complex analytical and GenAI outputs into clear, actionable insights for business stakeholders, product teams, and
...
- Support prototyping, validation, and deployment of GenAI and ML solutions, working with engineering teams to ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and maintainable. Continuously stay current with advancements in LLMs, GenAI frameworks, and healthcare AI trends, contributing innovative ideas and improvements to Optum’s capabilities
...

...
- Bachelor’s Degree (preferably in information technology, engineering, math, computer science, analytics, engineering or other related field)
...
- 4+ years of experience in handling/active development in data science projects
...
- 4+ years of experience in Microsoft Azure Cloud, Databricks, Mlflow, Spark SQL & Python

- Experience using Machine Learning Algorithms: Linear & Logistic Regression, Time Series analysis, Support Vector Machine, K-Means clustering, K-Nearest Neighbors Decision Trees, Random Forest, Naive Bayes, PCA, SVD, Artificial Neural Networks, Association Rules, Genetic Algorithm, Optimization, Bagging and Boosting algorithms etc.

Optum, part of UnitedHealth

, is a global health services and technology company revolutionizing healthcare

millions to better

Prairie, Minnesota, Optum serves patients, providers, payers, and pharmacies worldwide with innovative platforms for care optimization, claims processing, and population health management.
